 Â· 2011 Â· 2012 Â· 2013 Â· 2014 Â· 2015 Â· 2016 Â· 2017 Â· 2018 Â· 2019 Â· 2020 Â· 2021 Â· 2022 Â· 2023 Â· 2024 Â· 2025 Â· 2026 Â·  		Live
Setlist
Shows Without Complete Audio Sources in the Community: 1997 - 2007
DMB have had an open taping policy from the beginnings of the band. Until 2.25.95, tapers could even bring in a recorder and request a patch from the soundboard. Aside from the effort required by the crew, DMB had released Under the Table and Dreaming and their popularity was skyrocketing. The Roseland Ballroom shows preceding the new policy had more than 10 digital tape decks patched together. Since then, all approved taping has been with microphones and considered "audience" sources. Thirty years later, tapers are still organizing to cover as many shows as possible. With the acceptance of cell phone videos at concerts, we can now cobble together even more information for shows that don't have tapers in attendance.

Here are the shows that currently do not have "traditional" audio recordings. The spirit of this list is to note shows that fans can't readily listen to, so shows that were not recorded by a taper but released/streamed by the band will not be listed. We have also excluded private shows where tickets were not available to the public in any fashion.

This information is divided into several lists to make it more digestible. It should be considered a working document - you could see changes to shows listed, list divisions, columns, notes, etc. and it is static data that requires manual updates. If you find that some newly found tapes or shows are out of sync with these lists, or you see a show on this list that you have your collection, please let us know.

Column Index
Setlist? - Do we have a confirmed setlist for this show? Mostly older shows without setlists. If we have an unconfirmed setlist entered into the site, this checkbox will be "no." But all setlists without tapes could have an unlisted song we don't know about without a tape (see 12.27.96).

Partial? - Do we have a partial tape? This isn't meant to mark every show with a missing piece of audio, but if a tape is missing a full song or more, we have listed it here and marked the checkbox as "yes."

Footage? - Do we have other footage? This could be a Facebook Live stream that was saved, fan full concert footage on youtube.

All lists:
Shows Without Complete Audio Sources in the Community: 1995
Shows Without Complete Audio Sources in the Community: 1996
Shows Without Complete Audio Sources in the Community: 1997 - 2007
Shows Without Complete Audio Sources in the Community: 2008 - 2017
Shows Without Complete Audio Sources in the Community: 2018 - present
Date Venue & Location Show Type Setlist? Partial? Footage? Show Notes 
02.10.97Branscomb Memorial Auditorium (Florida Southern College), Lakeland, FLDave Matthews & Tim Reynoldsonly known missing regular D+T show until Feb. 2007 (see below); first known D+T The Maker
07.13.97Winter Park Ski Resort, Winter Park, CODave Matthews & Tim Reynoldsmissing last several songs - we have no encore, but possible one was played; partial tape contains Spoon song debut
05.13.98Plaza of Nations, Vancouver, BC, CANDave Matthews Bandtape is missing the second half of the show including first Stay (Wasting Time) set closer

07.12.98Santa Maria d'Ãneu, Escalarre, Lleida, ESPDave Matthews BandDoctor Music Festival; our setlist comes from a few songs an attendee remembered - it should be considered missing

01.27.99Stanley Theatre, Utica, NYDave Matthews & Tim ReynoldsMatinee Benefit
02.23.99Tilson Auditorium (Indiana State University), Terre Haute, INDave Matthews & Tim Reynoldstape is missing last two encore songs
05.04.01Tom Lee Park, Memphis, TNDave Matthews BandBeale Street Music Festival
05.05.01Fair Grounds Race Course & Slots, New Orleans, LADave Matthews BandNew Orleans Jazz and Heritage Festival; Tawatha Agee, Brenda White King, Cindy Mizelle, Lenny Kravitz, & Paul Simon guest
08.06.03Tulagi's, Boulder, CODave Matthewswe have no information about this show
08.24.04Cricket Pavilion, Phoenix, AZDave Matthews Bandtape is missing What Would You Say opener
06.15.05Blossom Music Center, Cuyahoga Falls, OHDave Matthews BandRobert Randolph guests on Stand Up (For It) & Louisiana Bayou
08.31.05ABQ Journal Pavilion, Albuquerque, NMDave Matthews Bandone of only three performances of Blackbird
09.18.05Tweeter Center Chicago, Tinley Park, ILDave MatthewsFarm Aid 2005; Gravedigger & Ants Marching released on Farm Aid 20th Anniversary Concert
09.20.05Radio City Music Hall, New York, NYDave MatthewsFrom the Big Apple to the Big Easy - Hurricane Katrina Benefit
02.04.06Atlantis, Paradise Island, BHSDave Matthews & FriendsCaribbean Cruise Getaway; taper put away gear in the storm - several songs missed before show was stopped
04.29.06Fair Grounds Race Course & Slots, New Orleans, LADave Matthews BandNew Orleans Jazz & Heritage Festival; half the show broadcast, Louisiana Bayou released on Jazzfest 2006; The Edge guests on Smooth Rider not available
10.17.06Qwest Field, Seattle, WADave Matthews BandOpener for The Rolling Stones
10.20.06Sun Bowl Stadium (The University of Texas at El Paso), El Paso, TXDave Matthews BandOpener for The Rolling Stones
02.26.07The National Stadium, Dublin, IRLDave Matthews & Tim ReynoldsDodo released on Europe 07; some songs on youtube
02.27.07Waterfront Hall Conference & Concert Centre, Belfast, NIRDave Matthews & Tim Reynoldsfirst D+T Can't Stop
03.06.07La Cigale, Paris, FRADave Matthews & Tim Reynoldstape is missing first three songs
03.14.07Vega, Copenhagen, DNKDave Matthews & Tim ReynoldsSatellite released on Europe 07, Ants Marching on Live at Radio City, & Where Are You Going on Songs for Tibet
